parameters: So? What was it you wanted me to do while you sit around on
As I said, the policy's wrong! No one can be saved this way!
Please place someone else in charge!
ドルベージャ倒したあと
Human affairs are so complicated. Loads of different humans come
here every day to get them sorted out.
After hearing about the things that worry them, I keep thinking
they should get off their asses and fix it themselves.
